title: TE Connectivity (TEL) Q3 Earnings Beat, Sales Fall Y/Y
text: TE Connectivity's (TEL) fiscal third-quarter results reflect solid momentum across transportation solutions. However, softness in communication solutions has been concerning.

title: TE Connectivity Ltd. (TEL) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: TE Connectivity Ltd. (NYSE:TEL ) Q3 2023 Earnings Conference Call July 26, 2023 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Sujal Shah - Vice President-Investor Relations Terrence Curtin - Chief Executive Officer Heath Mitts - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Chris Snyder - UBS Wamsi Mohan - Bank of America Steven Fox - Fox Advisors Matt Sheerin - Stifel Mark Delaney - Goldman Sachs William Stein - Truist Securities Christopher Glynn - Oppenheimer Joe Giordano - TD Cowen Samik Chatterjee - JPMorgan Luke Junk - Baird Shreyas Patil - Wolfe Research Guy Hardwick - Credit Suisse Operator Ladies and gentlemen good morning, and thank you for standing by.

title: TE Connectivity (TEL) Reports Q3 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say
text: Although the revenue and EPS for TE Connectivity (TEL) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: TE Connectivity (TEL) Q3 Earnings Top Estimates
text: TE Connectivity (TEL) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.77 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.66 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.86 per share a year ago.

title: TE Connectivity Beat Earnings Estimates. Tesla Helped.
text: The electrical components supplier reported earnings per share of $1.77 for its fiscal third quarter. Wall Street was looking for $1.66.

title: TE Connectivity announces third quarter results for fiscal year 2023
text: EPS exceeds, sales in line with guidance; continuing strong cash generation SCHAFFHAUSEN, Switzerland , July 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- TE Connectivity Ltd. (NYSE: TEL) today reported results for the fiscal third quarter ended June 30, 2023.

title: 3 Electronics Stocks to Escape Pandemic-Led Disruptions
text: Pandemic-led supply chain disruptions hurt the Zacks Electronics - Miscellaneous Components industry. Industry players like TEL, NVT and OLED are set to gain from IoT and automation prospects.

title: What's in the Cards for TE Connectivity (TEL) in Q3 Earnings?
text: TE Connectivity's (TEL) fiscal third-quarter results are expected to reflect strength in the Industrial and Transportation segment amid weakness in the Communication segment.

title: What Makes TE Connectivity (TEL) a New Buy Stock
text: TE Connectivity (TEL) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.

title: TE Connectivity to report third quarter financial results on July 26, 2023
text: SCHAFFHAUSEN, Switzerland, July 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ — TE Connectivity Ltd. (NYSE: TEL), a world leader in connectors and sensors, will report financial results for the third quarter of fiscal 2023 before trading begins on July 26, 2023. title: TE Connectivity to report third quarter financial results on July 26, 2023
text: SCHAFFHAUSEN, Switzerland , July 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- TE Connectivity Ltd. (NYSE: TEL), a world leader in connectors and sensors, will report financial results for the third quarter of fiscal 2023 before trading begins on July 26, 2023.
